Nit-ac..personality: A deeply broken-down individual, worn by prolonged physical suffering, who presents as irritable, obstinate, and hypersensitive to all stimuli including noise, cold, and even medicines. They are chilly, emaciated, and anxious-looking with an expression of deep suffering etched into their features.
Nit-ac..mental_state: Mental prostration with vanishing thoughts upon any effort to reflect; inability to comprehend what is said. The mind is exhausted yet paradoxically restless—weary of life but terrified of death, with constant anxiety about declining health and an inability to be consoled or comforted about misfortune.
Nit-ac..emotional_pattern: Dominated by hopeless despair alternating with irritable anger—they rage over their own mistakes, tremble with anger, and refuse consolation, yet are easily startled and moved to weeping. A pervasive indifference and joylessness pervades their existence, worsening before menses and in the evening, with a peculiar amelioration of the entire mental state while riding in a carriage.
